input_text: Penguins do not fly. The toy of the child was broken. The teacher showed the students the map. Muggles can not disappear. John is a nice man. A red and blue flag waved. Greg is a bad man. The guide offered the tourists tea. Mike has a pear. The length of Nile is 10 meters. Paul, a carpenter, carried a box. Mary visited London in September. The stone was heavy. Which man has an apple?
